basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has published the Project Technical Support II (Field Staff) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Technical Support II (Field Staff) position. Candidates up to 30 years of age and holding 12th in Science with a Diploma/ B.Sc. MLT and the required experience, or a three-year Graduate degree in a relevant subject with 2 years of experience, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 03 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and walkin interview details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/B.Sc MLT) + 5 year experience in relevant subject/field or Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject + 2 year experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: Project Technical Support II (Field staff): 12th in Science with Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) or B.Sc MLT and 5 years of experience in a relevant subject/field. OR Three Years Graduate degree in a relevant subject with 2 years of experience in a relevant subject.

salary_details.details: Project Technical Support-II (Field staff): Rs. 20000 + 20% HRA/month

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/B.Sc MLT) + 5 year experience in relevant subject/field or Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject + 2 year experience in relevant subject

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II (Field staff) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Vacancy 2026
AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support II (Field staff): 12th in Science with Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) or B.Sc MLT and 5 years of experience in a relevant subject/field. OR Three Years Graduate degree in a relevant subject with 2 years of experience in a relevant subject.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support-II (Field staff): Rs. 20000 + 20% HRA/month

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 03 August 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 12th in Science with a Diploma in MLT or B.Sc MLT and 5 years of relevant experience, or a Three Years Graduate degree in a relevant subject with 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month, plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-II (Field staff) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report directly at the venue on the specified date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Interview.
